name: 2021-22 Ultimate Collection Hockey Cards

sections.title: Base
sections.odds: 100 cards. Serial numbered #/149. · PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/35, Purple #/15, Black #/5.

sections.title: Base Autographs
sections.odds: Overall odds - 1:9 boxes. Specific group odds noted. · PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/35 or #/15, Purple #/5, Black 1/1. · All cards not in each parallel. See full spreadsheet at the bottom.

sections.title: Base Legends Autographs
sections.odds: Overall odds - 1:50 boxes. Specific group odds noted. · PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/35 or #/15, Purple #/5, Black 1/1.

sections.title: Base Ultimate Rookies Auto Patch
sections.odds: PARALLEL CARDS: Jumbo Patch #/15, Shield Patch 1/1. · *Jesse Ylonen only in Jumbo; Alexander Holtz only in Shield.* · All cards not in each parallel. See full spreadsheet at the bottom.

sections.title: Ultimate Introductions Autographs
sections.odds: Overall odds - 1:4.5 boxes. Specific group odds noted. · PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/50, Black #/10, Purple 1/1. · All cards not in each parallel. See full spreadsheet at the bottom.

sections.title: Ultimate Introductions Showcase Autographs
sections.odds: Overall odds - 1:200 boxes. Specific group odds noted. · PARALLEL CARDS: Gold #/35, Black #/5, Purple 1/1. · All cards not in each parallel.
